sourcePrompt: An AC-47 "Spooky" gunship, a Douglas C-47 transport turned side-firing gunship, about twenty meters long with a wingspan wider still, sitting tail-down on taildragger gear. A rounded nose and stepped cockpit lead a fat cigar fuselage; two radial engines with propellers hang on broad low wings; a tall rounded tail fin rises aft.. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
